author: IGN YouTube
text:
Star Trek: Outposts Unknown - Official Announcement Trailer
To boldly go… and build in Star Trek: Outposts Unknown. Check out the Star Trek: Outposts Unknown announcement trailer for this upcoming narrative-driven outpost builder game set in the Star Trek universe. Build complex research facilities through the mysterious X’Lehari System. Explore strange new worlds, guide your crew through dangerous encounters, and uncover a cosmic force threatening all life in the system. Set alongside the era of Star Trek: Strange New Worlds, your journey will take you across hostile environments, abandoned ships, ancient ruins, and a fragile civilization in desperate need of aid. Star Trek: Outposts Unknown will be available on PC. A demo is out now on Steam.

#ign #gaming #summerofgaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Void/Breaker: Ascension - Official Update Trailer
Watch the latest Void/Breaker trailer to see what to expect with the Ascension update, where you'll step into Zone 5, continue the sci-fi story, and fight through a destructible urban city overrun by a hostile AI invasion. The update brings the sniper rifle, new enemies, new enemy variants, new boss, new fragmented zones, balance updates, and more to the roguelite FPS game. The Ascension update for Void/Breaker is out now on PC. Void/Breaker will be available on Xbox Series X/S and PlayStation 5 (PS5) in 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Magic: The Gathering's Head Designer Reveals Brand New Marvel Super Heroes Cards - IGN Live 2026
The Marvel Super Heroes set brings together iconic characters from across the Marvel Universe—from legendary heroes to world-threatening villains—reimagined through Magic’s gameplay. We had Head Designer Mark Rosewater and Marvel's Jesse Falcon on stage with us to reveal some brand new cards, including Hyperion, Immortus, Doctor Doom, The Vision and Scarlet Witch, and Sauron, Dino Devotee. Check out the full interview here!

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Gothic Remake Not Interested in Holding Your Hand - IGN Live 2026
The Gothic Remake aims to breathe new life into the familiar classic to appease the old fans, but without alienating new players who may be interested in giving it a go. The Developers explain why games like Cyberpunk 2077 made it a point to take inspiration from the original Gothic game and how they are now looking to the games it inspired to make the franchise accessible to a new audience.

#IGN #IGNLive #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
CoD Modern Warfare 4's DMZ 2.0 Is Ready to Take on Extraction Shooters | IGN Live 2026
Call of Duty: Modern Warfare developers Jack O'Hara and Joe Cecot share more details about Call of Duty DMZ 2.0, an improved experience in Call of Duty's extraction shooter mode. We discuss improvements over last year's effort, the new radiation system, dynamic weather, and the updated matchmaking systems.

#IGN #IGNLive #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Planet Zoo 2 - Official Gameplay Trailer
Build a wilder world in Planet Zoo 2. Create distinctive zoos around the globe filled with awe-inspiring animals, including fully aquatic and flying species, before taking your experience beyond the zoo to release your animals into expansive Wildlife Reserves. 
Planet Zoo 2 is coming to PC, Xbox Series X|S & PlayStation 5 on October 13.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Warhammer 40,000: Darktide - Official Skitarii Gameplay Reveal Trailer
The trailer showcases the Skitarii's advanced weaponry, distinctive battlefield presence, and unwavering devotion to the Machine God as they join the fight against the hordes of Tertium. The Skitarii Class arrives on June 23, bringing one of the Imperium's most iconic factions to the battlefields of Atoma Prime. Players can wishlist the class on Steam now ahead of launch.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Outward 2 - Official Open Beta Trailer
Explore Aurai, take in the sights, see the dangers, gameplay, combat, and why you should probably bring a friend along in the adventure in this latest Outward 2 trailer for the upcoming adventure RPG. Outward 2 casts players into the humble shoes of an adventurer who will only achieve glory through careful planning, observation, critical thinking, and preparation in the unforgiving world of Aurai. Outward 2 will be available in early access on Windows PC via Steam, the Epic Games Store, and GOG on July 7, 2026. An open beta is available now.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Valheim - Official Version 1.0 Release Date Trailer
Valheim gets a new trailer and a version 1.0 release date announcement. Check out the latest Valheim trailer for another look at this Viking survival game. The Version 1.0 update will bring the arrival of Deep North, Valheim’s final biome, wrought with ancient evils and lurking threats. What at first seems like a picturesque postcard is bound to quickly turn into a struggle to survive as the land awakens to banish any invaders trying to set foot on its icy shores. Valheim leaves early access, and version 1.0 will be available on PC, Linux, Mac, Xbox One, Xbox Series X/S, PlayStation 5 (PS5), and Nintendo Switch 2 on September 9, 2026.

#ign #gaming #summerofgaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
How The Fast and Furious: Hollywood Drift Coaster Recreated The Look (and Speed) Of The Movies
The Fast and Furious: Hollywood Drift roller coaster is at the starting line and ready to go. Universal Studios Hollywood's VP of Creative Jon Corfino spoke with IGN about the level of granular detail the ride's designers went into to evoke the feel of the Fast franchise and teased easter eggs fans in the queue should keep their eyes out for.

#IGN #IGNLive #SummerOfGaming
